docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, N. R. AS TO DEFENDANT FISHER, CHARLES DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, N. R. SERVED DEC-23-1995, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FISHER, CHARLES
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $80.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, N. R. AS TO DEFENDANT FISHER, CHARLES
